name: airtable
title: Airtable MCP Server
description: Table listing, record CRUD, and filtering for Airtable bases.

toolDetails.name: airtable_list_tables
toolDetails.description: List all tables in the configured Airtable base.

toolDetails.name: airtable_get_records
toolDetails.description: Fetch records from a table with optional formula filtering and max records limit.

toolDetails.name: airtable_create_record
toolDetails.description: Create a new record in a table with specified fields.

toolDetails.name: airtable_update_record
toolDetails.description: Update an existing record by ID with partial field changes.

toolDetails.name: airtable_delete_record
toolDetails.description: Delete a record by ID from a table.
